name: Topped Apple Cake
recipeInstructions: Cream sugars and shortening together. Beat in eggs, mixing well. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and baking soda. Add sifted dry ingredients alternately with sour milk to creamed mixture. Fold in apples. Pour into greased 9 x 13 baking pan. Stir nuts, sugar, and cinnamon for topping. Sprinkle over cake. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes.
